mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(CAL_ORDER), 0) FROM AR_STA_ITEM_PARAM WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}

SELECT a.ITEM_NO as itemNo, gvi.CONTENT as nameVi, gen.CONTENT as nameEn, gzh.CONTENT as nameZh, gko.CONTENT as nameKo FROM AR_STA_ITEM a LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON a.ITEM_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON a.ITEM_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON a.ITEM_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON a.ITEM_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko' WHERE a.ITEM_NO NOT IN ( SELECT ITEM_NO FROM AR_STA_ITEM_PARAM WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} ) ORDER BY a.ORDERNO, a.ITEM_NO
mapper.update: UPDATE AR_STA_ITEM_PARAM SET UNIT = #{unit}, MIN_UNIT = #{minUnit}, CAL_ORDER = #{calOrder}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, ORDERNO = #{orderno}, MANAGE_FLAG = #{manageFlag}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP} WHERE PARAM_NO = #{paramNo}
